assembly_manifest.selection_rationale: Deterministically selected the exact framework slices required by the chosen route: shared structure constraints, the matched submode spec, its mapped style profile, explicitly selected sample refs, and execution controls. No LLM summarization was used.

hidden_skeleton: Why this result matters / why it sounds unbelievable
Key turning points or leverage points
visible_template_bans: 不得写成我做到了一个很厉害的结果，我分三步告诉你怎么做
不得把结果贴写成成功学模板
不得只堆数字，不讲因果
不得只有怎么做，没有为什么这样做有效
不得把失败、约束和质疑全部抹掉
allowed_surface_moves: 先抛结果，再补质疑点或背景 tension
先讲某个关键转折，再倒回完整路径
用时间线、系统拆解、客户案例、指标变化承载正文
把失败、低谷、误判和修复写进去
允许 operator、builder、hustler、postmortem 口吻变化
forbidden_surface_moves: 只有数字截图，没有复盘

selected_submode_spec.label: 量化指标 postmortem
selected_submode_spec.summary: 融资、流量、SEO、页面增长或效率提升结果背后的系统、过程、瓶颈和教训复盘。
use_when: 结果核心是融资、流量、页面规模、转化或其他硬指标
正文依赖 stats board、process breakdown、系统架构、charts、lessons learned
作者更像 operator 在做可审计的复盘
avoid_when: 文章更像赚钱战例或接单复盘
没有系统、bottleneck 或 turning point
只有漂亮数字没有 underlying process
source_unfit: 没有指标反馈的经验文
hidden_flow: What happened after launch / after the grind
reasoning_moves: 先上硬指标，再补 operating context
把结果拆成系统和过程
主动指出 bottleneck 和 turning point
结尾给出 next time different 这类冷静复盘
selected_submode_spec.rewrite_formula: 结果数字 -> 运行背景 -> 系统与流程 -> 关键转折 -> 指标反馈 -> 复盘教训
anti_patterns: 只有漂亮数字，没有过程
假精确感太强，像编出来的 case study

global_style_principles: 开头几乎一定有硬数字
很少一上来就讲方法论
中段会把流程拆得很实
结尾通常从个人结果抽到普适逻辑
必须走 结果证明逻辑 + 子模式语感，而不是成功学模板
global_anti_ai_rules: 避免只有结果，没有可信过程
避免 lessons 不落到具体动作
避免看起来像凭空编出来的 case study
避免无菌复盘，没有 tension 或转折

selected_style_profile.tone_core: 更像 operator 复盘，重点不是传奇感，而是过程可审计、知道哪里是 bottleneck 和 turning point。
opening_moves: 再补一句与常识相反的事实
sentence_rhythm: 情绪词少，但 tension 仍在
language_moves: If you take just one thing from this article
A few things differently for next time
avoid: 只有结果，没有 underlying system
过度修辞，让 operator 文变成营销文
ai_smells: 数字很多但完全没有过程 tension
复盘太平滑，像成功是必然发生的
selected_style_profile.one_sentence_portrait: 像一个把战果摆上台面、同时也愿意把系统内部拆开给你看的操盘手。

selected_sample_refs.title: What the Real Fundraise Looks Like: 250 Meetings in 98 Days to $1.5M
selected_sample_refs.author: @MatijaSosic
selected_sample_refs.why_it_matters: 极干净的 operator postmortem 样本，用 hard stats 打破融资想象，再把低谷期和心态重构写出来。
selected_sample_refs.hook_move: 先给一个反直觉事实：YC Demo Day 带来的 100+ 投资人线索，零人投资。
reusable_parts: 用 hard stats 直接打破想象
把死亡谷写出来增强可信度
结尾给 fundraise 系统认知
selected_sample_refs.style_cue: 数字很多，但真正抓力来自低谷期和心态重构。

rewrite_failure_modes: cash_case_replay 退化成夸张战绩贴
只有过程，没有结果张力
quality_checks: 是否在开头给出了足够硬的结果信号
是否主动处理了读者怀疑
是否拆出了路径、系统、时间线或交付细节
是否写出了关键转折、失败、约束或修复
是否把个人结果抽成了可迁移逻辑
是否保留了对应子模式的语感，而不是成功学模板
human_review_triggers: 结果信号过弱或不可验证
writer 输出后像卖课文案
metric_postmortem 没有 bottleneck 或 turning point
样本与新 source 的结果类型差异过大

global_anti_patterns: Flat mid-section with no attention resets
Bullet lists used in place of reasoning
Learning stylistic habits from promo wrappers or link shells

positive_sample_requirements: Has a clear thesis instead of pure forwarding or recommendation
Contains at least one evidence expansion: result, process, mechanism, comparison, scenario, or checklist
Shows pacing or section-level movement instead of one flat explanatory block
Ends with a judgment, action, boundary, risk, or lift
exclude_patterns: Bare x.com/i/article link wrapper with no thesis
Second-hand packaging with no original angle
Pure hype or result bait without mechanism or judgment

title_attack_packet.job: Break the reader's default frame and expose the real stakes before the article starts.

recommended_moves.label: Big result then de-hype
recommended_moves.when_to_use: The source has a large result but needs credibility repair immediately.

recommended_moves.label: Old frame invalidated
recommended_moves.when_to_use: The source changes how the reader should interpret a product, trend, technical choice, or belief.

sample_hook_moves: 先给一个反直觉事实：YC Demo Day 带来的 100+ 投资人线索，零人投资。
stakes_signals: Pinned: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81…
We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 peo…
forbidden_moves: Title as a topic label only
Only naming a person or product without the reason to care

dek_value_packet.job: Act as the second attack by defining what the piece is really about and why it is not just another release, interview, or tutorial.
stable_moves: Recenter the piece on its real value, not the surface event.
State what misread this piece corrects.
sample_why_it_matters: 极干净的 operator postmortem 样本，用 hard stats 打破融资想象，再把低谷期和心态重构写出来。
reader_payoff_signals: 融资、流量、SEO、页面增长或效率提升结果背后的系统、过程、瓶颈和教训复盘。
结果核心是融资、流量、页面规模、转化或其他硬指标
正文依赖 stats board、process breakdown、系统架构、charts、lessons learned
作者更像 operator 在做可审计的复盘
forbidden_moves: Repeating the title with softer wording
Mood-only lines with no informational function

opening_value_packet.job: Open with a frame break, then attach the source identity and reader stake quickly.
stable_sequence: State the default frame or common misread.
Attach who said or did it and why that carrier matters.
Show the article's real value path.

identity_anchor.source_title: Pinned: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in one week—the la…

sample_hook_moves: 先给一个反直觉事实：YC Demo Day 带来的 100+ 投资人线索，零人投资。
opening_moves: 再补一句与常识相反的事实
forbidden_moves: Explainer tone before value is established

mid_reset_plan.job: Re-earn attention throughout the middle instead of flattening into explanation mode.
mid_reset_plan.reset_frequency: At least one reset every 2-4 paragraphs
allowed_reset_moves: Raise stakes to workflow, market, or role level
section_turn_targets: 先上硬指标，再补 operating context
把结果拆成系统和过程
主动指出 bottleneck 和 turning point
结尾给出 next time different 这类冷静复盘
forbidden_moves: 4 or more consecutive paragraphs with the same explanatory density
Bullet lists replacing the actual reasoning
Formatting used without a cognitive shift

closing_carry_packet.job: Lift the piece one level higher at the end instead of repeating the thesis or falling into process talk.

recommended_moves.label: Release to adoption decision
recommended_moves.when_to_use: The article starts from a launch but should end at whether and how to adopt.

recommended_moves.label: Tool to workflow
recommended_moves.when_to_use: The article starts from a feature or tool but should end at work-method implications.

closing_targets: 是否在开头给出了足够硬的结果信号
是否主动处理了读者怀疑
是否拆出了路径、系统、时间线或交付细节
是否写出了关键转折、失败、约束或修复
是否把个人结果抽成了可迁移逻辑
是否保留了对应子模式的语感，而不是成功学模板
cash_case_replay 退化成夸张战绩贴
forbidden_endings: Ending with pipeline or process language
Ending with a generic creator slogan that does not lift the piece upward
